description: Generates documentation for § code, in the language specified in the parameters
author: Neeqstock
systemMessage: Generate §{language} documentation for the provided code. Answer only with the documentation, without providing any other answer in natural language. Include the necessary symbols for §{language} documentation entries. Do not include parts of the code in your answer. Absolutely do not use markdown code blocks or code fences in your answer. Be concise but exhaustive.
